context.projectOverview: Phase B Sprint 4 (final): after the rounds complete, assemble a PURE data bundle (final-round child results + all blackboard findings + round count) and atomically write it to <rootDir>/.bober/fleet-synthesis.json for the head to synthesize. NO LLM/network call. Only on blackboard runs; no-blackboard runs write NOTHING extra (byte-identical). fleet-report.json shape/behavior unchanged and always written.

completedSprints.title: SharedBlackboard
completedSprints.summary: readAll(): FactRecord[] — collect() bundles this. Commit e1d4b00.

completedSprints.title: Coordinator rounds loop
completedSprints.summary: runFleet branch at index.ts ~:135: if(dbPath) ensureDir + SharedBlackboard.open + coordinator.executeRounds(manifest, bb, {maxRounds, dbPath}) in try/finally(bb.close()) else coordinator.execute. Final-round executions feed the existing aggregate + reporter.build + write fleet-report.json. Commit 2e16f19. NOTE: executeRounds returns the final round's executions; the round count run is available there too.

relevantFiles: src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet — report build+write @~:124; the Sprint-3 blackboard branch + try/finally(bb.close()) — you add the synthesis write AFTER the report write and MOVE bb.close() to after synthesis since collect() calls bb.readAll())
src/fleet/reporter.ts (PortfolioReport shape — reuse for childResults in the bundle)
src/fleet/manifest-write.ts (atomic tmp+rename write helper to reuse for fleet-synthesis.json)
context.principlesRef: .bober/principles.md — ESM .js imports, import type, node:fs/promises only (atomic tmp+rename like manifest-write.ts), unicode section headers, conventional commits 'bober(sprint-4): ...'. CRITICAL: collect() is PURE (no provider/client/network import in synthesis.ts); fleet-synthesis.json written ONLY on blackboard runs (byte-identical no-file otherwise); fleet-report.json shape unchanged + always written; SEQUENCE the close so bb.readAll() in collect() runs BEFORE bb.close().
